Metadata.title: SUNBIOTAN | Professional Natural Tan without UV Rays
Metadata.description: SUNBIOTAN — melanin activator with 100% natural ingredients. Safe, even, and long-lasting tan. Available at authorised salons in Portugal and Spain.
Metadata.ogDescription: The natural treatment that respects and cares for your skin. Radiant, safe, and long-lasting tan — without UV rays.
Metadata.twitterDescription: Safe, even, and long-lasting tan with 100% natural ingredients.

Footer.tagline: Natural and professional tan. Elegance and expertise within your reach.

Hero.subtitle: The natural treatment that respects and cares for your skin, providing a radiant, safe, and long-lasting tan.

About.headline: What is
About.p1: It is a melanin activator, formulated with naturally derived ingredients, that progressively stimulates the skin's colour
About.p1End: . It works on all skin types, even the fairest or most sensitive, with visible and safe results.
About.p2: In addition to enhancing the skin's natural tone, SUN also treats, tones, and illuminates, with a gentle lifting effect, leaving the skin visibly firmer and more revitalised.
About.p3: Applied with a high-precision aesthetic device, through a micro-diffusion system that gently deposits the product onto the skin, ensuring an even, natural, and progressive tan.
About.detail3: Can be used all year round

01.title: Natural Tan
01.description: Even and uniform, adapted to each person's skin tone.

02.title: Deep Hydration
02.description: Immediate silky effect with intense and long-lasting hydration.

03.title: Firming Effect
03.description: Brightening and anti-ageing with a visible gentle lifting effect.

04.title: Intense Radiance
04.description: Radiant and luminous skin with a natural and healthy glow.

05.title: Immediate Results
05.description: Visible from the very first application, with no waiting.

06.title: 100% Natural
06.description: Active plant-based ingredients from sustainable agriculture.

07.title: Quick Application
07.description: Simple, fast, and efficient implementation at any centre.

08.title: For All Skin
08.description: Suitable for delicate, sensitised, or skin with special needs.

01.title: Immediate Flash Effect
01.description: Golden tan visible right after application, with a fresh and luminous result.

02.title: Natural Evolution
02.description: The tan develops progressively over the hours, becoming richer and more intense.

03.title: Ideal Result
03.description: The following day, the colour reaches its perfect point: natural, even, and radiant.

04.title: 7 to 9 Days
04.description: The tan lasts 7 to 9 days, depending on skin type and subsequent care.

MapPreview.headline: Find your
MapPreview.subtitle: Available exclusively at Authorised Sunbiotan Centres.

CtaProfessionals.p1: Offer your clients the safest, most natural, and most effective tan on the market.
CtaProfessionals.p2: SUN is also available for beauty salons, spas, and industry technicians. Join our network of certified professionals.
CtaProfessionals.perk1Desc: Access to professional training and support from the SUN team.
CtaProfessionals.perk2Desc: Premium high-value services to differentiate your salon in the market.
CtaProfessionals.perk3Desc: Network of certified professionals with access to exclusive benefits.

Contact.headline: Get in
Contact.subtitle: Do you have a question, suggestion, or simply want to know more about Sunbiotan? We are here to help.

ProfissionaisPage.subtitle: Offer your clients the safest and most natural tan on the market. Join the Sunbiotan certified centre network.
ProfissionaisPage.cta1: I want to be a partner
ProfissionaisPage.benefit1Desc: Complete and ongoing training by the Sunbiotan team. Your staff will be ready to deliver outstanding results.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit2Desc: Add a premium high-value service to your menu. The SUN natural tan sets your space apart in the market.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit3Desc: Access to Sunbiotan professional products at special partner conditions, with a 100% natural formula.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit4Desc: Join a curated network of centres in Portugal and Spain. Map visibility and marketing materials included.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit5Desc: Your space receives the "Sunbiotan Certified Centre" seal, conveying trust and quality to your clients.
ProfissionaisPage.benefit6Desc: Dedicated support from our team at every stage. You are never alone in the growth process.
ProfissionaisPage.step1Desc: Fill in the form below with your space's details. We review each application personally.
ProfissionaisPage.step2Desc: Our team will contact you within 48 hours to learn more about your project and space.
ProfissionaisPage.step3Desc: After approval, we schedule in-person or online training for your team.
ProfissionaisPage.step4Desc: You receive the products, materials, and access to the exclusive Sunbiotan partner portal.
ProfissionaisPage.formSubtitle: Fill in the form and we will contact you within 48 hours. No commitment.
ProfissionaisPage.placeholderMessage: Tell us a little about your space...
ProfissionaisPage.errorSubmit: An error occurred. Please try again or contact us directly.
ProfissionaisPage.successDesc: We have received your request. Our team will be in touch within 48 hours.
